profile.title: Profile
profile.signInSubtitle: Sign in to sync your collection

home.step1Desc: Go to the Scanner tab and point your camera at a Yu-Gi-Oh! card.
home.step2Desc: Organize your scanned cards into different binders.
home.step3Desc: Your collection is automatically synced with your account.

db.updateAlertMessage: A database update is available. If you are on cellular data, this may consume significant data. Do you want to proceed?

session.clearSessionConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all cards?

binder.title: Binders
binder.subtitle: Manage your collection of binders
binder.newMessage: Enter a name for your new binder:
binder.firstBinder: You don't have any binders yet! Create a new one to start organizing your collection.
binder.deleteInfo:
This will delete the cards there too.

This actions cannot be undone.

⚠️ Info: you can merge binders before delete this binder.

merge.title: Select binders to merge
merge.message:
You are merging {{source}} into {{target}}. This will move all cards from {{source}} to {{target}} and then delete {{source}}.

⚠️ Info: This action cannot be undone.

validation.error: An error occurred, please try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Be the best duelist with your organized collection.

validation.error: An error occurred, please try again.

permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.subtitle: Yugioh Card Scanner needs access to a few permissions in order to work properly.
permissions.enableInSettings: Please go to settings and enable permissions

camera.title: Camera
camera.description: Yugioh Card Scanner needs access to your camera to scan your cards.

microphone.title: Microphone
microphone.description: Yugioh Card Scanner needs access to your microphone to improve card detection in noisy environments.

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Yugioh Card Scanner needs access to storage to save images of your cards and sync them with your collection.

mediaLocation.title: Media Location
mediaLocation.description: Yugioh Card Scanner needs access to your media location to organize images of your cards and sync them with your collection.

foregroundService.title: Foreground Service
foregroundService.description: Yugioh Card Scanner uses a foreground service to keep the camera active while you scan your cards, even if you switch to another app temporarily.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Yugioh Card Scanner needs permission to send notifications about the status of your card synchronization and other important updates.
